title: SkillsFuture for Digital Workplace
text:
SkillsFuture for Digital Workplace - SupportGoWhere
SkillsFuture for Digital Workplace
Share link
Equips Singapore Citizen adults with essential digital skills for the evolving digital economy.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Develop a deep understanding of critical digital competencies for the evolving economy
Safely navigate technology-rich environments with cybersecurity awareness
Master various digital tools, including nationally recognized platforms, for strategic data utilization
Collapse all sections
About this support

Navigate technology-rich environments with awareness of cybersecurity risks, ensuring secure work practices

Acquire proficiency in diverse digital applications and tools, including nationally recognized platforms, while understanding the strategic use of data and information

Gain insights into essential jobs and digital skills needed in today's and tomorrow's digital economy

Who is this for?

Singapore Citizen or Permanent Resident

Employers can tap on SFDW2.0 to equip their employees with the necessary aptitudes and skills

How to apply?

Choose a programme partner and contact them directly:

Ascendo Academy Pte Ltd: Email sdfw@ascendo.edu.sg or call +65 8383 2908

Capelle Academy Pte Ltd: Email contactus@capelleconsulting.com or call +65 6325 4982

James Cook Institute Pte Ltd: Email enquiry@jci.edu.sg, call +65 6737 5761, or WhatsApp +65 8767 0614

Eduquest International Institute Pte. Ltd.: Email info@eduquest.sg or call +65 6338 7151

Lithan Academy Pte Ltd: Email info@lithan.com or call +65 6324 9730

NTUC LearningHub Pte Ltd: For individual enquiries, email sales@ntuclearninghub.com or WhatsApp +65 8488 5482. For corporate enquiries, email corpsales@ntuclearninghub.com

Nanyang Polytechnic: Visit their website for more information

Singapore Chinese Chamber Institute of Business: Email enquiry@scciob.edu.sg or call +65 6505 3898 / +65 6334 1080

Singapore National Employers Federation: Email christopher_oh@snef.org.sg or call +65 6827 6919

Where can I find help?

View more details

Mondays to Fridays

Closed on Sat, Sun & Public Holidays
